subject: Outlook add-in does not show Zoom meeting in calendar
description: New meetings lack Zoom button; user manually pastes links from web scheduler.

ts_steps.title: Enable add-in
ts_steps.action: Outlook → Get Add-ins — confirm Zoom for Outlook enabled; check Disabled Items.

ts_steps.title: COM add-ins
ts_steps.action: File → Options → Add-ins — manage COM add-ins — ensure Zoom Outlook Plugin checked.

ts_steps.title: Repair Office
ts_steps.action: Online Repair Microsoft 365; reinstall Zoom client with Outlook plugin option.

internal_information: Click-to-Run vs MSI differences; new Outlook vs classic. Plugin deprecated in favor of cloud add-in in some tenants.
